name: Arizona Chuck Wagon Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound Dried navy or pinto beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Pick over the beans and rinse them well. Combine the beans and water in a large kettle. Bring to boiling; cover; cook for 2 minutes. Remove from heat and let stand for 1 hour, then pour into a slow cooker.
2. Brown the salt pork in a large skillet; remove with a slotted spoon to the cooker. Sauté onion, garlic, and green pepper in pan drippings; remove with a slotted spoon to the cooker. Brown beef, a few pieces at a time, in pan drippings; remove to the cooker with a slotted spoon. Stir in salt, oregano, red pepper, cumin, and tomato sauce. Add more water if necessary to bring the liquid level above the beans.
3. Cook on low for 10 hours or on high for 6 hours, or until the beans are tender.
